message:
fix(genome): resolve bootstrap tool paths for nested agent tree

Add findBootstrapToolsDir() that scans the agent tree to locate the
correct tools directory for agents in a nested tree layout. Update
loadAgentToolsWithBootstrap() to use it instead of the flat path
assumption (bootstrapDir/agentName/tools/).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
